name: Hand Cannon
description: Hand Cannons are pistols that can roll with one of four barrel types, each changing performance: - Dahl barrel: better handling, including accuracy, recoil and recoil recovery. - Tediore barrel: higher damage at the cost of accuracy. - Bandit or scav barrel: higher damage at the cost of accuracy. - Maliwan barrel: small accuracy boost.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
